scripts.dev: yarn workspace @griffins-scout/game build && yarn workspace @griffins-scout/logger build && yarn workspace @griffins-scout/api build && concurrently --handle-input --kill-others --names "CONTROLLER,CLIENT,SCANNER,VIEWER" -c "bgYellow.bold,bgRed.bold,bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "yarn workspace @griffins-scout/controller dev" "yarn workspace @griffins-scout/client start" "yarn workspace @griffins-scout/scanner dev" "yarn workspace @griffins-scout/viewer dev"
